# Pratik Padiya - Portfolio

> Pratik Padiya is a Solutions Engineer (pre-sales) with 10+ years of experience across Fintech, Payments, and SaaS. He helps enterprise retail clients in APAC evaluate and adopt loyalty platforms, bringing a product management background from Mastercard to pre-sales, solution design, and customer success.

## Identity
- Full name: Pratik Padiya
- Role: Solutions Engineer (pre-sales) | Former Product Manager
- Domain expertise: Loyalty platforms, Fintech, Payments, APAC markets
- Previous employer: Mastercard (Product Management, APAC)
- Contact: pratik.padiya@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pratikpadiya/
- GitHub: https://github.com/ppadiya

## Key Achievements
- Led the Security Bank BetterBanking Rewards Program, winner of the RBI Asia Trailblazer Award 2025 for Best Advance in Loyalty/Rewards Programme
- Drove $10M+ revenue at Mastercard by launching localized payment card benefit products across APAC
- Architected a unified API gateway reducing third-party integration costs by 30% and enabling 50% faster partner integration
- Built a performance management platform for Nisa Group automating 80% of manual workflows

## Projects
- Loyalty UI Demo: https://pratikpadiyaportfolio.netlify.app/loyalty-ui/
- APAC Product Launch Framework: https://pratikpadiyaportfolio.netlify.app/PM+Framework/
- Retail and Loyalty Intel Feed: https://pratikpadiyaportfolio.netlify.app/news-events/
- AI Prompt Optimizer: https://pratikpadiyaportfolio.netlify.app/ai-tools/
